references.hebrew: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה יִ֭סְעָדֶנּוּ עַל־עֶ֣רֶשׂ דְּוָ֑י כׇּל־מִ֝שְׁכָּב֗וֹ הָפַ֥כְתָּ בְחׇלְיֽוֹ׃
references.english:
GOD will sustain them on their sickbed;
You shall wholly transform their bed of suffering.bYou shall wholly transform their bed of suffering Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
references.matched_snippet: יסעדנו על ערש דוי תניא נמי הכי הנכנס
